mapper.select: SELECT * FROM training_record_detail WHERE training_record_id = #{trainingRecordId} ORDER BY sort_order
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO training_record_detail (training_record_id, action_id, action_name, sets, weight_kg, sort_order) VALUES (#{trainingRecordId}, #{actionId}, #{actionName}, #{sets}, #{weightKg}, #{sortOrder})

INSERT INTO training_record_detail (training_record_id, action_id, action_name, sets, weight_kg, sort_order) VALUES
(#{item.trainingRecordId}, #{item.actionId}, #{item.actionName}, #{item.sets}, #{item.weightKg}, #{item.sortOrder})
